data.title: Inter has obtained approval from Florida OFR and Federal Reserve to establish a U.S. banking branch in Florida.
data.description: Inter has successfully obtained regulatory clearance from the Florida Office of Financial Regulation (OFR) and the Federal Reserve to open a state-licensed international banking branch in Florida. This development will expand Inter's presence in the region and enhance its banking services in the state.
GOOGLE REPORTED TO BE IN TALKS WITH STONEPEAK’S RADIATE FOR FIBER ASSET JV

data.title: Bitcoin transitioning into 'macro asset' with $4 trillion market value in 2025, 75% trading range, ended 2025 down 7.9%.
data.description: Binance predicts Bitcoin (BTC) is on the trajectory to evolve into a macro-driven financial asset, propelled by the embrace of institutions, the introduction of regulated products, and the progression in stablecoin oversight. In its evaluation for 2025 and projections for 2026, Binance highlighted 2025 as a significant yet turbulent year for the crypto realm, witnessing a total market valuation exceeding $4 trillion. Throughout the year, Bitcoin experienced fluctuations amidst macroeconomic uncertainties, changes in monetary policies, trade disputes, and geopolitical tensions. Bitcoin exhibited a 75% fluctuation range and concluded the year with a 7.9% decline. Binance emphasized the increasing alignment of crypto price trends with traditional macroeconomic cycles rather than solely dependent on crypto-focused developments. Moreover, institutional involvement in the crypto sphere broadened significantly.

data.title: Linganore Winecellars celebrates 50 years of winemaking in Maryland with special events & promotions.
data.description: Celebrating its 50th anniversary, Linganore Winecellars in Mount Airy, Maryland, is commemorating its milestone with a series of special events and promotions. Established fifty years ago in Frederick County, the vineyard has become a trailblazer in the Maryland wine industry. The festivities are set to take place throughout the year to honor the legacy and success of Linganore Winecellars in the community.

data.title: Stellar (XLM) now offers ZK proof tools for enterprises, allowing private transactions on public blockchain, maintaining compliance.
data.description: Stellar (XLM) has unveiled new ZK proof capabilities that allow enterprises to carry out private transactions on a public blockchain, while still meeting compliance standards. This development aims to provide a secure and regulatory-compliant environment for businesses exploring blockchain technology. With this enhancement, Stellar is enabling users to ensure confidentiality in their transactions while ensuring adherence to necessary regulations. It offers a unique solution for enterprises seeking to leverage the benefits of blockchain while maintaining privacy and meeting industry requirements. This advancement is poised to revolutionize how businesses utilize blockchain technology, potentially opening up new opportunities in the ecosystem.

data.title: Goldman Sachs CEO mentions that the CLARITY Act still needs progress. US lawmakers yet to return to address the market structure bill. The company is keeping an eye on tokenization and stablecoins.
data.description: The timeline for US lawmakers to resume discussions on a market structure bill remains uncertain. However, CEO David Solomon mentioned that Goldman Sachs is keeping a close watch on the advancement of the bill concerning tokenization and stablecoins.
Fed's Jefferson: I expect 2% economic growth in near term and unemployment rate to hold steady this year.
Fed's Jefferson: Current policy stance leaves us well-positioned to determine how much and when to adjust the policy rate.

data.title: Newrez, a US lender, will now accept cryptocurrencies like Bitcoin, Ether, crypto ETFs, and stablecoins for mortgage approval.
data.description: Under the latest policy update, borrowers will now have the option to utilize Bitcoin, Ether, crypto ETFs, and US dollar-backed stablecoins for verifying assets and estimating income without the need for liquidation. This move aims to provide greater flexibility for borrowers, allowing them to leverage their cryptocurrency holdings in the lending process.
Fed's Jefferson: Pleased to see increased use of standing repo operations when economically sensible

data.title: CIOs prioritize value-driven IT in tight budgets at Info-Tech LIVE 2026, New Orleans. Event on Feb 3-4 at The Roosevelt.
data.description: As demands increase for cost control, accountability, and measurable results, CIOs and IT leaders face pressure to justify the value of each technology choice. The upcoming Info-Tech LIVE 2026 event in New Orleans on February 3 and 4 at The Roosevelt New Orleans will provide a platform for these professionals to showcase the impact of their decisions.

data.title: Dow Jones wavers at near record highs; Nvidia stock rises, bank stock soars. Live updates on Investor's Business Daily.
data.description: Friday saw the Dow Jones index hovering close to all-time highs while Nvidia stock regained a significant level. The stock market displayed uncertainty with the Dow and S&P showing inconsistent movement, while a bank stock surged. This information was covered live by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Fed may still cut rates in December despite pushback from Powell; S&P 500 fluctuates.
data.description: It was anticipated that there would be a Federal Reserve rate reduction and the cessation of quantitative tightening. However, the S&P 500 experienced a decline following Chairman Jerome Powell's statement. Despite Powell's resistance, it is still probable that a rate cut by the Federal Reserve will occur post-December. The S&P 500 showed wavering in response to this news.
